narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,177 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
